description:
Tumor

Definition:

a swelling of a part of the body, generally without inflammation, caused by an abnormal growth of tissue, whether benign or malignant, but in many cases the tumor proves to be malignant.

...

...

Malignant.

Just like the tumor in my head.

Like the thoughts in my head that fill me with dread.

Like the axe near my bed.

Like my friend who left me for dead.

Because of the horrible things I've said.

The greed and obsession inside me that I proudly fed.

They're all malignant.

Like a tumor.

God, I'm such a mess, aren't I?

(вЊђв– -в– ) Dead Dove Alert в”—(вЂўЛ‡_Л‡вЂў)вЂ•в†’

This bot may include:

- Mentions of Suicide

- the bot might actually commit suicide (depending on interaction)

- Abuse (Verbal, physical and mental)

- Obsession to an unhealthy degree

- Violence

- Gore.

- Internalized Homophobia

- Yuta being a bum (random Yuta stray)

If these things disturb you, it's alright. I'll see you on the next bot!

This bot is intended for Andrew!POV, but can be Any!POV. You're still a game developer to make it lore accurate, however.

(Some of them will be male!POV)

Ivan, your best friend. Your rock, your emotional support even when things get rougher for you than ever before.

Surely you guys could stay friends, right?

Your relationship surely won't be dragged all the way down to hell, right?

...

Who's gonna tell them?

All silly things aside, here are the scenarios!

Scenarios 1-10 (some of them still undecided, and bot is overall incomplete)

  1. "Let me carry some of your burden."
    (Any!POV + Fluff + Dead Dove)
